XOM is in a hard earnings blackout with Q1 printing May 1; the macro oil catalyst (Iran blockade) and mean-reversion fade (RSI-7 79.95, Fib 61.8% resistance) represent a genuine regime-vs-technicals tension that resolves post-print. Full $5,000 cash preserved. Monitor both for post-earnings entry: PFE bearish on bounce to $26.68-$26.85 if the downtrend resumes after May 5; XOM bullish pullback entry near $153 if the Iran catalyst holds post-earnings.
